page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached options. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, offering predictable performance for enterprise workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g7.32xlarge offers high resource density for workloads requiring substantial compute and memory capacity without the premium cost of specialized GPU or high-RAM configurations. Tradeoffs include the reliance on external storage and the lack of hardware acceleration for machine learning. Suitable workloads include enterprise applications, web serving, container orchestration, and general-purpose database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 512.0 GB of RAM to deliver a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, ensuring efficient data transfer. This configuration is designed for enterprise applications, web serving, container orchestration, and database hosting that require dedicated compute resources without specialized hardware acceleration.
